title: Mazhai Nindra Song Lyrics Raman Thediya Seethai
stanzas: <div>Mazhai Nindra Song Lyrics Raman Thediya Seethai

Mazhai nindra pinbum
thooral pola
unai marandha pinbum
kaadhal.

alai kadatha pibum
eeram pola
unai pirintha pinbum
paadal.

enakkum kadhal piranthirukke
atharkun peyar vaikattumaa
enakul idhayam thanithirukke
adhai unnidam serkkatumaa

Mazhai nindra pinbum
thooral pola
unai marandha pinbum
kaadhal.

alai kadatha pibum
eeram pola
unai pirintha pinbum
paadal.

neerthuligal nilamvithaal
pookkal mella thalai asaikkum
en manadhil nee nulainthaai
mounam kooda isai amaikkum

poonguyilgal marainthirunthaal
koovum oasai maraivathillai
thamaraiyaai naan irundhum
thaagam innum adangavillai

paatham irandu nadakkum
indha payanathil enna nadakkum
vaanam irukkum varaikkum
indha vaanavil unnudan irukkum

mazhai thuli pani thuli
kalintha pinne
adhu marubati irandena
printhidumaa

Mazhai nindra pinbum
thooral pola
unai marandha pinbum
kaadhal.

alai kadatha pibum
eeram pola
unai pirintha pinbum
paadal.

Kan imaigal kai thattiye
unnai mella alaikirathe
un seviyil vilavillaiyaa
ullam konjam valikkirathe

unnaruge naan irunthum
unami solla thunivu illai
kaigalile viral irunthum
kaigal korka mudiyavillai

unnai enakku pudikkum
adhai solvathilthane thayakkam
neeye sollum varaiyum
en kadhalum kaathu kidakum

Mazhai nindra pinbum
thooral pola
unai marandha pinbum
kaadhal.

alai kadatha pibum
eeram pola
unai pirintha pinbum
paadal.

enakkum kadhal piranthirukke
atharkun peyar vaikattumaa
enakul idhayam thanithirukke
adhai unnidam serkkatumaa

seo.title: Mazhai Nindra Song Lyrics Raman Thediya Seethai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Mazhai Nindra expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Raman Thediya Seethai, this song highlights the protagonist's emotional journey and connection with their love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Kalyani and composed by Vidyasagar.

When was the song released?

Mazhai Nindra was released on September 4, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mazhai Nindra, the protagonist reflects on the beauty of love and the pain of separation. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the characters navigate their emotions, the song serves as a poignant reminder of the power of love. Its enchanting composition by Vidyasagar and Kalyani's captivating voice create an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhai Nindra from the film Raman Thediya Seethai is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Kalyani's enchanting vocals and Vidyasagar's soulful composition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this beautiful track that perfectly encapsulates the emotions of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Love is like rain that falls softly, forgetting you is like the rain that stops.
Separation is like a wave that washes away, a song that plays after parting.
Is there a name for the love that was born for me? My heart is alone, will it unite with you?
Love is like rain that falls softly, forgetting you is like the rain that stops.
Separation is like a wave that washes away, a song that plays after parting.
When the rain falls, flowers bloom slowly, you reside in my heart, even silence creates music.
When the cuckoos hide, their call is never lost. Even if I am a lotus, my thirst still remains unquenched.
In this journey, two paths will cross, what will happen until the sky remains? In this sky, I will be with you.
After the rain and droplets mix, will it return to the same place?
Love is like rain that falls softly, forgetting you is like the rain that stops.
Separation is like a wave that washes away, a song that plays after parting.
With your eyes, you softly touch me, but my heart is still a little restless.
Even if I am with you, there is no promise, even if my fingers are there, they cannot hold you.
I like you, and expressing that is my struggle, until you say it, my love will remain hidden.
Every day, dreams come and go, marriage brings tears and joy.
Love is like rain that falls softly, forgetting you is like the rain that stops.
Separation is like a wave that washes away, a song that plays after parting.
Is there a name for the love that was born for me? My heart is alone, will it unite with you?
